conventions.tests: PascalCase + Test suffix in tests/Feature or tests/Unit

RegisterUser.description: POST /api/register — creates a new user and sends verification email

methods.register: Controller method — validates request then calls UserService
methods.createUser: Hashes password and persists user via Eloquent

AuthenticateUser.description: POST /api/login — validates credentials and returns Sanctum token

methods.login: Controller method — calls Auth::attempt then issues token
methods.attempt: Laravel Auth facade checks email+password against users table
methods.issueToken: Creates Sanctum personal access token for the authenticated user

ManageProducts.description: CRUD endpoints for product catalogue management

methods.index: Returns paginated product list with optional category filter
methods.store: Validates and creates new product, uploads image via ImageService
methods.update: Patches product fields, re-uploads image if new file provided
methods.destroy: Soft-deletes product record (keeps for order history integrity)

PlaceOrder.description: POST /api/orders — creates an order and initiates payment

methods.store: Controller method — wraps entire flow in DB::transaction
methods.buildFromCart: CartService converts session cart items into OrderLine records
methods.chargeCustomer: PaymentService calls Stripe and returns charge ID
methods.confirmOrder: Sets order status to confirmed and clears the cart
